_readme: Copy this file to .secrets.local.json (gitignored) and fill in. Give me only what you're comfortable with; each field unlocks a different capability. Rotate/revoke anything here once I'm done.
_recommended_low_risk: A dedicated test user you create in Supabase Dashboard > Authentication > Add user. RLS (AND-35) isolates it to its own empty data, so I can drive the real app in Chrome to verify UI without ever touching your workout history.
_optional_higher_risk: Direct Postgres connection string, only if you want me to run SQL migrations myself instead of doing the 3-click SQL Editor run. This is effectively full DB access (read/write/delete all rows). If you provide it, rotate the DB password afterwards (Dashboard > Settings > Database > Reset password). Leave blank to run migrations yourself.
